zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Mauduit II於大約1092年出生在英國哈普爾哈特雷 莫迪特時，他的父親Knight William I Maudit27歲，母親Matilda24歲。他和Maude Hanslape至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1158年2月在英國巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Mauduit II于大约1092年出生在英国哈普爾哈特雷 莫迪特时，他的父亲Knight William I Maudit27岁，母亲Matilda24岁。他和Maude Hanslape至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1158年2月在英国巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mauduit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mawditt
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French mal-duit ‘badly brought up, ill educated’ (Latin male doctus).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Mauduit II was born about 1092, in Hartley Mauditt, Hampshire, England, his father, Knight William I Maudit, was 27 and his mother, Matilda, was 24. He had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Maude Hanslape. He died in February 1158, in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Mauduit II est né environ 1092, à Hartley Mauditt, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Knight William I Maudit, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Matilda, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Maude Hanslape. Il est décédé en février 1158, à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Mauduit II um 1092 in Hartley Mauditt, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Knight William I Maudit 27 und seine Mutter Matilda 24. Er hatte mit Maude Hanslape mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Februar 1158 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Mauduit II è nato il circa 1092 nel Hartley Mauditt, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, Knight William I Maudit, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Matilda, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Maude Hanslape. Morì nel febbraio 1158, nel Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Mauduit IIが約1092年にイギリスハンプシュアイアハートリー マウディットで生まれた時，父Knight William I Mauditは27歳，母Matildaは24歳であった。彼はMaude Hanslapeとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1158年2月にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンスロペで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Mauduit II(이)가 대략 1092년 영국 함프실르 하틀리 모딧에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Knight William I Maudit(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Maude Hanslape(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1158년 2월 영국 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Mauduit II nasceu aproximadamente 1092, em Hartley Mauditt, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Knight William I Maudit, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Matilda, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Maude Hanslape. Ele faleceu em fevereiro de 1158, em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Mauduit II родился около 1092 г. в местности хартли маудитт, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Knight William I Maudit было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda, 24. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Maude Hanslape. Он умер февраль 1158 г. в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Mauduit II nació aproximadamente 1092, en Hartley Mauditt, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Knight William I Maudit, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Matilda, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Maude Hanslape. Murió en febrero de 1158, en Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
